content.text: 1. The Core Essence of Linear Inequalities

This detailed secondary tutorial is engineered to cover the complete syllabus for JSS 2 / Year 8 Mathematics in the Second Term. We explore critical formulas, diagrams, properties, and step-by-step applications.
Academic Standard: Vetted by HMG Academy concepts curriculum experts to ensure seamless compatibility with national secondary requirements.
